tryon.title: Virtual try-on, on autopilot
tryon.subtitle: THEYINE dresses every product in your store on the model you choose, then uploads the generated image back to Shopify. No studio, no shoot, no waiting.
tryon.sliderHint: Drag to compare before and after
tryon.proof: Real output — “{product}” dressed on the model in seconds by the live automation.

steps.title: Pulls the product
steps.desc: Automatically collects images of unprocessed products from your Shopify store.

steps.title: Dresses the model
steps.desc: AI fits the product onto your chosen brand model, realistically.

steps.title: Writes back to store
steps.desc: Adds the image to the product and tags it “done” — never processed twice.

pricing.title: Simple, symbolic pricing
pricing.subtitle: Indicative starting points for the first stage — the final scope is shaped around your catalog.
pricing.note: Symbolic prices — the exact plan is finalized after a short discovery call.

tryonPage.seoDescription: Automatically dress your Shopify products on a model with AI and write the images back to your store. Enterprise-grade, 24/7, multilingual.

hero.title: Virtual try-on for your entire Shopify catalog
hero.subtitle: An end-to-end automation that turns plain product photos into on-model imagery — generated, written back to Shopify, and tagged, without a studio or a shoot.

pipeline.title: Three systems, one seamless flow
pipeline.subtitle: Connected once, running quietly in the background — scheduled or triggered on demand.

steps.title: Shopify
steps.desc: Pulls product images from the collection you choose.

steps.title: Fal.ai
steps.desc: Virtual try-on dresses your model, then polls to completion.

steps.title: Shopify
steps.desc: Writes the generated image back and tags the product done.

pipeline.runtime: Runs 24/7 on Modal — scheduled or webhook-triggered, with retries and error alerts.

caseStudy.title: Proven on a live store
caseStudy.subtitle: Measured on the theyine-dev store during the pilot run.
caseStudy.quote: From a flat photo to an on-model image, written straight back to the store — no manual step in between.
